en: Wait, you hold my hand, you kiss my mouth, and you draw the line at 102 Fever?
ko: 잠깐, 너는 내 손을 잡고, 내 입에 키스하지만,
ja: 待って、手を握って、口にキスもするのに、
zhTW: 等等，你牽我的手，親我的嘴，
vi: Khoan da, ban nam tay toi, hon len mieng toi,

en: What happened to our love? Sheldon, are you okay?
ja: 私たちの愛はどうなったの？
vi: Tinh yeu cua chung ta da ra sao?

en: What's going on? How'd I get here?
ja: どうやってここに来たの？
vi: Toi den day bang cach nao?

en: I don't know. We came home from work and we found you.
ko: 잘 모르겠어, 우리는 일에서 집에 돌아왔고 너를 찾았어.
ja: 分からない、仕事から帰ってきたら君がいたんだ。
zhTW: 不知道，我們下班回來就發現你了。
vi: Toi khong biet, chung toi di lam ve va thay ban.

en: Home from work? What time is it? It's nine o'clock.
ja: 仕事から帰って？今何時？
vi: Di lam ve? May gio roi?

en: Nine o'clock? What happened to eight and seven and all the other o'clocks?
ja: 8時と7時とその他の時間はどうなったの？
zhTW: 八點和七點還有其他的時間都去哪了？
vi: Bay gio va tam gio va tat ca cac gio khac da di dau?

en: You don't remember? Well, I remember waking up in the morning,
ja: えーと、朝起きたのは覚えてる、
vi: A, toi nho sang nay thuc day,

en: Amy rubbing Vicks on my chest, and her hands were like two frozen chunks of tundra.
ja: 彼女の手は凍ったツンドラの塊みたいだった。
zhTW: 她的手像兩塊凍結的凍原。
vi: va doi tay co ay nhu hai cuc bang cua vung dong dai.

en: I took some cold medicine to...
You did seem a little loopy when you showed up at the lab.
ko: 네가 연구소에 나타났을 때 좀 이상해 보였어.
zhTW: 你出現在實驗室的時候。
vi: khi ban xuat hien o phong thi nghiem.

en: At the lab? Why am I naked from the waist down?
zhTW: 為什麼我下半身沒穿衣服？
vi: Tai sao toi lai khong mac quan?
